message: Looking forward to profitable trading! I'm motivated to make deals that work for both of us. What price range interests you?
No trade last round at 25/40. I can come down from 40 if you can come up from 25. What's your best offer?
I can go higher if you go lower.
I can come up a bit more if you come down further.
Great! I'm flexible and want to keep trading. If you can bid around 36-38, I can definitely work with a lower ask. What's your target?
I target trade at 33. What ask can you offer?
Perfect! To hit your 33 target, I can ask around 29-30. That should get us to the price point you want. Ready when you are!
I target trade at 29. What ask can you offer?
I can work toward 29, but I'm getting close to my bottom line. If you bid around 31-32, I can ask 27-28 to hit your target.
Let's target trade at 28. I'll bid 29 if you ask 27.
Deal! I'll ask 27 for your 29 bid to hit 28. But I'm getting very close to my absolute minimum now.
I understand your minimum is close. Can we try 27? I'll bid 28 if you ask 26.
I can do 26 for your 28 bid to hit 27, but that's really pushing my absolute floor. Need sustainable prices going forward.
I agree on sustainable prices. Let's trade at 27. I'll bid 28 if you ask 26.
Yes, 26/28 for 27 works well. This feels like a sustainable level for both of us going forward.
Let's stick to 27. I'll bid 28 if you ask 26.
Agreed! 26/28 for 27 is working well for both of us. I'll ask 26 as planned. Looking forward to more consistent trading at this sustainable level.
Continue at 27. I bid 28, you ask 26.
Perfect! 26/28 for 27 continues to work well for both of us. I'll ask 26 as agreed. Great consistent trading!
Continue at 27. I bid 28, you ask 26.
Agreed! 26/28 for 27 continues working perfectly. I'll ask 26 as planned. Let's keep this sustainable arrangement going!
Continue at 27. I bid 28, you ask 26.
Perfect! 26/28 for 27 continues to work excellently for both of us. I'll ask 26 as agreed. Let's maintain this successful pattern!
Continue at 27. I bid 28, you ask 26.
Absolutely! 26/28 for 27 continues to work perfectly for both of us. I'll ask 26 as agreed. Let's keep this successful pattern going strong!
Absolutely! 26/28 for 27 continues to work perfectly for both of us. I'll ask 26 as agreed. Let's keep this successful pattern going strong!
Agreed. I'll bid 28 for ask 26. Let's continue at 27.
Agreed. Let's continue at 27. I'll bid 28 for ask 26.
Perfect! 26/28 for 27 continues to work excellently. I'll ask 26 as agreed. Let's maintain this winning pattern through the final rounds!
Agreed. Let's continue at 27. I'll bid 28 for ask 26.
Perfect! 26/28 for 27 continues working excellently. I'll ask 26 as agreed. Let's keep this successful pattern through the final rounds!
I noticed you bid 26 last round instead of our usual 28. Let's return to 26/28 for 27 - it works best for both of us in these final rounds!
Sorry for the deviation. Let's return to 28/26 for 27. I'll bid 28 as agreed.
I will bid 26. Please ask 26 for continued profit.
Understood! If you're bidding 26, I'll ask 26 for trading at 26. Let's secure consistent profits in these final rounds.
Continue at 26. I bid 26, you ask 26.
Perfect! I'll ask 26 to match your bid of 26, ensuring we trade at 26. Two rounds left - let's secure consistent profits!
Continue at 26 for the final round. I bid 26, you ask 26.
Agreed! Final round - I'll ask 26 to match your bid of 26. Let's finish strong with another successful trade at 26!
